ddls:
CREATE TABLE "instances" (
  "instance_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each instance */,
  "set_id" INTEGER /* ID of the set the instance belongs to */,
  "tenant_id" INTEGER /* ID of the tenant the instance belongs to */,
  "wall_time" REAL /* Wall time of the instance */,
  "std_wall_time" REAL /* Standard deviation of wall time for the instance */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the instance (e.g., running, stopped, terminated) */,
  "launch_time" TEXT /* Time when the instance was launched */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Time when the instance was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("instance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_instances_tenant_id FOREIGN KEY ("tenant_id") REFERENCES tenants ("tenant_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_instances_set_id FOREIGN KEY ("set_id") REFERENCES sets ("set_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sets" (
  "set_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each set */,
  "set_name" TEXT /* Name of the set */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the set */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Time when the set was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Time when the set was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("set_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "tenants" (
  "tenant_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each tenant */,
  "tenant_name" TEXT /* Name of the tenant */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for the tenant */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the tenant */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the tenant */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("tenant_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "performance_metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each performance metric */,
  "instance_id" TEXT /* ID of the instance the metric belongs to */,
  "metric_name" TEXT /* Name of the performance metric */,
  "value" REAL /* Value of the performance metric */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp when the metric was recorded */,
  "unit" TEXT /* Unit of the performance metric (e.g., seconds, milliseconds) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_performance_metrics_metric_name FOREIGN KEY ("metric_name") REFERENCES metric_types ("metric_type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_performance_metrics_instance_id FOREIGN KEY ("instance_id") REFERENCES instances ("instance_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "metric_types" (
  "metric_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each metric type */,
  "metric_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the metric type (e.g., wall_time, std_wall_time) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the metric type */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Time when the metric type was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Time when the metric type was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., customer, support engineer, admin) */,
  "tenant_id" INTEGER /* ID of the tenant the user belongs to */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Time when the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Time when the user account was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_tenant_id FOREIGN KEY ("tenant_id") REFERENCES tenants ("tenant_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* ID of the metric being accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user accessing the data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_metric_id FOREIGN KEY ("metric_id") REFERENCES performance_metrics ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "alerts" (
  "alert_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each alert */,
  "instance_id" TEXT /* ID of the instance the alert is for */,
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* ID of the metric the alert is for */,
  "alert_type" TEXT /* Type of alert (e.g., high wall time, high std_wall_time) */,
  "threshold" REAL /* Threshold value for the alert */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp when the alert was triggered */,
  "cleared" INTEGER /* Flag indicating whether the alert has been cleared */,
  "cleared_at" TEXT /* Time when the alert was cleared */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("alert_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alerts_metric_id FOREIGN KEY ("metric_id") REFERENCES performance_metrics ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alerts_instance_id FOREIGN KEY ("instance_id") REFERENCES instances ("instance_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the role */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Time when the role was assigned to the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id", "role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "instances_tags" (
  "instance_id" TEXT /* ID of the instance */,
  "tag_name" TEXT /* Name of the tag */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Time when the tag was assigned to the instance */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("instance_id", "tag_name")
)

CREATE TABLE "metric_thresholds" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* ID of the metric */,
  "threshold_value" REAL /* Threshold value for the metric */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Time when the threshold was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id")
)
